actionability.label: actionable
actionability.rationale: The detected smell is a Large Component, which is confirmed by the code snippet being 276 lines long. The component can be refactored by splitting it into smaller components, such as extracting the JSX for the spend cap options, the admonitions, and the collapsible table into separate components. This would improve readability and maintainability. The risk of breaking behavior is low to medium as the component's logic is relatively straightforward and can be modularized without altering its core functionality.
caveats: Split Component, Extract Component, Extract Logic to Custom Hook

invariants: Exported component name and its props API are unchanged
No new files are created — new component lives in the same file
plan.expected_smell_resolution: By extracting self-contained JSX blocks into smaller components, the overall size of the SpendCapSidePanel component will be reduced, improving readability and maintainability without altering its core functionality.
abort_reasons: The candidate block shares mutable state with sibling blocks
Extraction would require passing more than 5 props to the new component
